name: Sanara MedTech Inc.
summary: Sanara MedTech Inc. is a medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing products in the wound care and surgical sectors. The company develops, manufactures, distributes, markets, and sells medical products, some of which incorporate licensed third-party technologies. Sanara operates in competitive healthcare markets and relies on clinical acceptance, proprietary rights, and distribution networks to drive revenue growth.

products.name: Wound Care Products
products.description: Medical products for wound care treatment, developed and commercialized by Sanara MedTech.

products.name: Products Under Development
products.description: New products in development pipeline intended for future commercialization in medical markets.

partnerships.description: Sanara licenses technologies from third parties used in certain of its products.
Partners assist in protecting proprietary rights to technologies used in Sanara products.
